rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LI FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Modification Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/11/17. A filed stamped courtesy copy of the petition was required to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T, 14.91F]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 6 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to december 11, 2017. contrary to the allegation in the petition, the will is not self-proving. no proof of subscribing witness or other proof has been filed. the court received an ex parte communication from Michael Williams. he has been instructed to immediately serve a copy of the correspondence on all parties to the proceeding. mr. browne must provide a proposed order to the court.
